This is a testharness.js-based test.
Harness Error. harness_status.status = 1 , harness_status.message = Uncaught Element should have attribute 'data-expectedlabel'. Element: <img data-testname="el-image (empty label due to missing image&gt;title element)" data-expectedrole="image" data-expectedlabel="" class="ex-role-label ex-label-only ex-role-only">
Harness: the test ran to completion.
